content.en:
Under the action of Canghe Zhu, Ye Tian's last bit of immeasurable bone also began to complete four bone changes.

Time passed slowly, and the last immeasurable bone finally completely completed the four bone transformations.

Rumble!!!!!

The immeasurable bones of the whole body have completed four bone transformations, and Ye Tian's cultivation is also breaking through, and his whole body is transforming.

The endless energy around him poured into his body, causing his strength to skyrocket wildly, and every once in a while, his strength increased by a cut.

Time passed, a long time later.

Ye Tian's cultivation completely stepped into the four bone transformation realms, and his strength had undergone a earth-shaking improvement.

"My current strength is between the sixth and seventh bone transformation realms. The previous Lord of the Yuan Capital was only a top-notch sixth-stage Bone Transformation Realm combat power, and now he is no longer my opponent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

He was about to look for the traces of the Lord of the Yuan Capital, but after looking around, he didn't find it.

"Forget it, wait until the next time you meet him, and then kill him!"

Ye Tian then prepared to go to another place.

Eternal Demon City!

This place is one of the largest trading places in the territory, but it is a bit far away and a little dangerous on the way.

Before, the Lord of Xuanchen had mentioned the Eternal Ancient Demon City, but that place was too far away, much farther away than the Canghe Realm, so the Lord of Xuanchen had not been there.

Wow!

Ye Tian went to the Eternal Ancient Demon City, constantly shuttling and rushing along the way.

......

Mixed Sea.

The Lord of the True Dragons returns with serious injuries.

Suddenly, a bone transmutation asked.

"Lord of the True Dragon, are you alright?"

A bone metamorphosis asked.

"It's okay, I can't die yet!" the Lord of the True Dragon shook his head.

"What about the Lord of the True Dragon, the Lord of the Ruins?" asked the Lord of the Desolation.

"I don't know!" the Lord of the True Dragon shook his head, "I've been separated from the Lord of the Ruins since I entered the Land of Eternity. "

"Lord of the True Dragon, how did you get hurt like this?"

There is also a bone metamorphosis inquiry.

"I encountered the Eternal True Beast and was injured, and if it wasn't for luck, I wouldn't be able to escape. The Lord of the True Dragon sighed.

"Can you tell me about the land beyond eternity?"

These bone metamorphosis realms all want to know this.

"Yes, exchange resources for intelligence!"

The Lord of the True Dragon said.

He's injured now and he's going to take a long time to recover, so it makes sense to use his intelligence to earn a little bit of resources.

"Good!"

These bone transformation realms did not lack that bit of resources, so they agreed one after another.

Subsequently.

These Bone Transformation Realms used some resources to exchange information from the True Dragon Lord.

But Ye Tian's three vests didn't do this, he knew that the Lord of the True Dragon definitely didn't know much information, and it was not of much use, so he naturally had no interest in knowing.

Soon.

These bone transformation realms all knew some information about the Eternal Realm, and they were hesitant to enter one by one.

But in the end, they still didn't dare to enter.

......

Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Ye Tian kept shuttling and finally arrived here.

At this moment, a figure covered in countless blood-colored eyes and shrouded in purple mist passed by.

Ye Tian just glanced at the other party, as if he had been frozen, and it was difficult to move.

But the other party did not make a move on him, but quickly left.

"What a terrifying existence, I'm afraid it's at the level of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and it's not a cultivator!"

Ye Tian knew the other party's race by copying his talent, Blood Mist!

Moreover, the other party also has an ancient-level ancestral endowment - blood mist!

Ye Tian also copied the other party's primeval-level ancestral endowment.

Along the way, the eternal true beasts he encountered, but all those who had primeval-level ancestral endowments, he directly copied them.

Now, there are more and more primordial-level ancestral endowments on his body, and the foundation potential is becoming more and more terrifying.

"Let's enter the Eternal Ancient Demon City first!"

Ye Tian walked in.

......

Inside the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Here, cultivators coexist with the Blood Transformation Realm race, and occasionally a few Eternal True Beasts can be seen.

Later, Ye Tian knew that these Eternal True Beasts were a little special, so they were allowed to enter the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

The Eternal Ancient Demon City is a relatively fair place to trade, but any transaction must be paid to the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

This fee is not cheap, but it is not expensive, at least the Eternal Ancient Demon City can ensure that the transaction goes smoothly and there will be no problems.

And in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, there is also a currency.

Eternal Ancient Gold!

The resource of Eternal Ancient Gold is also a lot in the entire land of Eternity, and it is also precious.

This resource has many uses, such as refining weapons, building magic circles, repairing foundation wounds, and refining immeasurable bones, which can almost be regarded as a universal resource material.

Eternalgold is also divided into Primary, Medium, and Finest Eternal.

Among them, the primary eternal ancient gold and the medium eternal ancient gold were in circulation, and the high-grade eternal ancient gold was too rare, and for the six or seven bone transformation realms, they were all extremely precious supreme treasures.

Now.

Ye Tian didn't even have a piece of eternal ancient gold in his hand, and he couldn't even participate in the transaction.

"Gotta sell some resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He walked into a relatively large shop, which was owned by a cultivator.

He looked around the shop and inquired about the prices of various resources.

He found out that the shop even bought Canghe beads.

The purchase price of a Canghe pearl is 3,000 medium eternal ancient gold.

According to the fact that a medium eternal ancient gold is comparable to 1,000 primary eternal ancient gold, a Canghe pearl is 3 million primary eternal ancient gold, which is indeed very high.

Of course.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't sell the Canghe Bead in his hand, it was the Canghe Bead that he had obtained with great difficulty, so he would naturally keep it for the next breakthrough and use it again.

According to his calculations, Canghe Zhu was still useful for him to impact the five bone transformation realms.

In the end, Ye Tian disposed of some of the resources on his body that were not of much use.

Although it is not very useful, these resources are also suitable for the bone transformation realm, otherwise they will not be sold.

In the end, these resources were sold for a total of more than 5,000 Eternal Ancient Gold.

"With so many resources, it's only more than 5,000 eternal ancient gold, but a Canghe pearl is worth 3 million eternal ancient gold, no wonder the lord of the Yuan Capital can't help but do it to me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, once you succeed and really snatch a Canghe Pearl, it is blood earning, even if you don't use it, you can sell it for a large amount of eternal ancient gold!

With these Eternal Ancient Gold, he could rent a place to cultivate in the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Moreover, in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, it is also necessary to pay a fee, if you do not pay the fee for a long time, you will be perceived by the magic circle of the Eternal Ancient Demon City, so that you will be directly excluded from the Eternal Ancient Demon City and not allowed to enter.
